headline: PlayStation State of Play June 2026: All the news and trailers
summary: Sony's State of Play showcase airs June 2nd at 5PM ET. It comes as PlayStation faces rising PS5 costs and strategic shifts. Expect news and trailers ahead of Summer Game Fest.

headline: I held the next-gen handheld
summary: Intel's Panther Lake laptop chip performed excellently despite company challenges. A handheld version, the Arc G3 Extreme, was previewed. This marks a potential new direction for Intel in gaming hardware.

headline: Microsoft Build 2026: The 7 biggest announcements
summary: Microsoft Build 2026 keynote, led by Satya Nadella, revealed key announcements. New Surface hardware and an always-on personal assistant were featured. Updates across Microsoft's in-house AI models were also highlighted.

headline: Trump signs executive order to review AI models before they’re released
summary: President Trump signed an executive order creating a "voluntary framework" for AI companies. It requires sharing frontier models with the federal government pre-release. The goal is to promote secure innovation and strengthen critical infrastructure cybersecurity.

headline: Save Over 40% Off the Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Canceling Headphones During Amazon's Resale Event
summary: Get over 40% off Sony WH-1000XM6 noise-canceling headphones. The discount is available during Amazon's Resale Event. "Used: Like New" units are offered in limited quantities.

headline: It Looks Like Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis Is Delayed to 2027
summary: Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis appears set for a release date delay to 2027. The game was briefly available for preorder on Amazon. This news surfaced ahead of Sony’s State of Play showcase.

headline: Toy Story 3 Video Game Remaster Announced, Releasing Alongside Collection of Original Toy Story Games
summary: A remaster of the Toy Story 3 video game has been announced. It will be released very soon. A collection of the first two Toy Story games will accompany the remaster.

headline: Valve Reportedly Threatened to Delist Rainbow Six Siege on Steam After Ubisoft Offered Cheaper Alternative
summary: Valve allegedly threatened to delist Rainbow Six Siege from Steam. This occurred after Ubisoft offered a cheaper alternative elsewhere. The action highlights Valve's efforts to maintain Steam's marketplace dominance.

headline: Henry Nowak arrest footage raises 'serious questions for police', PM says
summary: PM Sir Keir Starmer states Henry Nowak's arrest footage raises serious police questions. The question of "how accusations of racism informed decision making" must be addressed. The incident prompts widespread scrutiny of police actions.

headline: Key moments from police bodycam footage
summary: BBC Verify analyzed police bodycam footage of Henry Nowak. The footage shows key moments after Nowak was stabbed by Vickrum Digwa. Details from the bodycam are now being highlighted.

headline: Murrell used fake invoices to cover up £400,000 spending spree
summary: The former SNP chief executive, Peter Murrell, admitted embezzling party funds. He used fake invoices to hide a £400,000 spending spree. Murrell now faces a lengthy jail sentence for his actions.

headline: Five questions left unanswered by the Mandelson files
summary: A second batch of files relating to Lord Mandelson's appointment as US ambassador has been released. These documents leave five significant questions unanswered. The files add to ongoing political interest in the appointment.
